anchor: Senior Data Scientist - LLM Focus (Remote US) - Seeking a highly motivated Data Scientist with 5+ years experience building and deploying Large Language Models (LLMs) using PyTorch (v2.0 or higher) and a strong foundation in Pandas for data manipulation and analysis. Must have demonstrable experience fine-tuning LLMs for specific downstream tasks, including prompt engineering, retrieval-augmented generation (RAG), and evaluation metrics like BLEU, ROUGE, and perplexity. Preferred experience with LangChain or similar LLM orchestration frameworks and cloud deployment (AWS, Azure, or GCP). Full-time, no C2C. Start date: Immediately. Security clearance not required. Startup experience a plus.

anchor:
Senior Full-Stack Engineer (MERN/GraphQL) - Remote Eligible

Seeking a highly motivated and experienced Senior Full-Stack Engineer to join our dynamic engineering team. Ideal candidates will possess 5+ years of professional experience designing, developing, and deploying scalable web applications utilizing the MERN stack (MongoDB, Express.js, React.js, Node.js) and GraphQL APIs. Expertise in front-end development with React.js and state management libraries (Redux, Context API) is essential, coupled with strong back-end skills encompassing Node.js, RESTful API design, and MongoDB database management. Experience with containerization (Docker, Kubernetes) and cloud platforms (AWS, Azure, GCP) is strongly preferred. Must be a US Citizen or Permanent Resident, authorized to work in the US without sponsorship. Full-time position, remote work considered with occasional travel to our Silicon Valley headquarters. No C2C agreements.
